basic_details.job_title: BMC Cooper Hospital Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 115 Wireman, Sweeper and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) - Hind Hridaysamrat Balasaheb Thackeray Medical College & Dr. Rustom Narsee Cooper Hospital, Juhu
basic_details.selection_process_brief: Merit list based on educational qualification and interview marks
basic_details.short_information: BMC Recruitment 2026 OUT! The Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) has released the official notification for recruitment to 115 posts across 24 categories at Hind Hridaysamrat Balasaheb Thackeray Medical College & Dr. Rustom Narsee Cooper Hospital, Juhu. Eligible candidates can apply through offline mode (in person only) for various contractual posts. Candidates aged between 18 to 38 years as on 01 July 2026 can submit their applications from 22 July 2026 to 30 July 2026.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 30 July 2026, 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM (excluding Saturdays, Sundays, public holidays)
important_dates.application period (in person): 22 July 2026 to 30 July 2026, 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM
important_dates.fee_payment_last_date: 22 July 2026 to 30 July 2026, 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM
important_dates.interview_date: Not yet released - to be displayed on the hospital notice board and communicated by phone

application_fee.details: The application fee is Rs. 1,028 (Rs. 870 + 18% GST of Rs. 158), payable at the Cashier Department (Room No. 65), 1st Floor, D Wing, Dr. Rustom Narsee Cooper Hospital, between 22 July 2026 and 30 July 2026, from 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM (excluding Saturdays, Sundays, and public holidays). The fee is non-refundable under any circumstances. The photocopy of the fee receipt must be attached to the application.

age_limit.details: As on 01 July 2026, a candidate's age must not be less than 18 years and not more than 38 years.

qualification.details: Eligibility is largely common across most posts, with additional trade-specific requirements for certain skilled posts: | For Sr. No. 1 to 24, candidates must generally have passed 10th/SSC, or an equivalent examination in the Marathi subject carrying a 100-mark question paper as per the respective post's educational requirement. Candidates must be able to read, write, and speak Marathi. For several posts (Sweeper, Ward Attendant, Ambulance Attendant, Tailor, etc.), candidates must also pass a trade/skill test conducted by the department.

vacancy_details.Qualification Requirement: 10th/SSC pass; must be able to read, write, and speak Marathi

vacancy_details.Post Name: Electrician / Wireman / Lift Operator / Combined Wireman-Lift Operator posts (Sr. No. 3–8)
vacancy_details.Qualification Requirement: 10th/SSC pass; candidates must hold a wireman license from the Maharashtra Public Works Department, or an ITI/NCTVT pass certificate in Electrician/Wireman trade; must have passed the 10th standard (or equivalent) Marathi language exam with a 100-mark question paper as per Maharashtra State Board norms; must read, write, and speak Marathi
Same qualification pattern as Sr. No. 3–8 above

vacancy_details.Post Name: Sweeper / Ward Attendant / Ward Servant / Ayah / Gardener-related posts / Porter-related posts / Worker
vacancy_details.Qualification Requirement: 10th/SSC pass; must have passed the 10th standard (or equivalent) Marathi language exam with a 100-mark question paper as per Maharashtra State Board norms; must read, write, and speak Marathi; must pass the departmental trade test

vacancy_details.Post Name: Ambulance Attendant / Hearse Attendant combined posts
vacancy_details.Qualification Requirement: 10th/SSC pass; Marathi language exam pass (100-mark paper); must read, write, and speak Marathi; must pass the departmental trade test
Not specified beyond the general 10th/SSC and Marathi requirement in the notification
Not specified beyond the general 10th/SSC and Marathi requirement in the notification

10th/SSC pass; a certificate of satisfactorily completed 1-year training in tailoring and cutting from a recognized government institution, OR a satisfactorily completed minimum 20-week Advanced Tailoring Course from Shramik Vidyapeeth; Marathi language exam pass (100-mark paper); must read, write, and speak Marathi; must pass the departmental trade test

salary_details.rs. 15,000: Laboratory Attendant, Laboratory Servant, Ambulance Attendant, Hearse Attendant & Halalkhor & Ambulance Attendant, Barber
salary_details.rs. 18,000: Electrician, Wireman, Lift Operator (and combined posts), Training Assistant, Sweeper, Ward Attendant, Ward Servant, Ayah, Gardener (and combined posts), Porter (and combined posts), Worker, Assistant/Helper
salary_details.details: Contractual employees will not be entitled to any Dearness Allowance (DA), House Rent Allowance (HRA), or similar benefits in addition to the fixed consolidated remuneration.

selection_process: A merit list will be prepared based on the prescribed educational qualification and the marks obtained in the interview. The selection list will be prepared from candidates in the merit list. The interview date will be displayed on the hospital notice board and communicated to candidates by phone. Candidates must reach the interview venue at least half an hour before the scheduled interview time.
how_to_apply: Ensure you meet the educational qualification, age, and other eligibility conditions for the post you wish to apply for.
Pay the prescribed application fee of Rs. 1,028 at the Cashier Department (Room No. 65), 1st Floor, D Wing, Dr. Rustom Narsee Cooper Hospital, between 22 and 30 July 2026, 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM.
Fill the application form completely and attach self-attested photocopies of all required educational and other supporting documents, along with the fee receipt photocopy.

Submit the completed application in person at the Establishment Department, 1st Floor, D Wing, Hind Hridaysamrat Balasaheb Thackeray Medical College & Dr. Rustom Narsee Cooper Hospital, between 22 and 30 July 2026, up to 4:00 PM.
Ensure a valid, regularly used email ID is mentioned in the application.
Applications sent by post or submitted online will not be accepted.
important_instructions: Applications submitted earlier to this or any other office will not be considered. BMC has not authorized any individual or organization to sell or accept applications on its behalf. Applications without the prescribed fee receipt attached will not be considered valid. Applications received by post or submitted online will not be considered. Character and antecedent verification will be conducted through the concerned police station before a temporary appointment is given. The temporary service period at any one time will not exceed 89 days. Service may be terminated without prior notice by the Dean if performance during the temporary period is found unsatisfactory. Since the appointment is on a contractual basis, appointees cannot approach any court regarding the appointment. Selected candidates must execute an agreement on a Rs. 500 stamp paper at the time of appointment. Candidates must complete biometric attendance daily as per their duty schedule; unauthorized absence will be treated as Leave Without Pay (LWP). If misconduct is noticed during the appointment period, the appointment will be terminated immediately without prior notice. A selected candidate wishing to resign must give one month's prior notice. Appointed candidates cannot claim any right to permanent service with the Municipal Corporation and will not be entitled to any benefits of regular service. Appointed candidates may be required to work in any department assigned by the department head, across three shifts. Candidates must attend the interview at their own expense. If false information, certificates, or documents are submitted, or information is found to be concealed at any stage of selection or after appointment, the candidature or appointment will be cancelled/terminated without prior notice. The Dean has the authority to halt the selection process at any stage for administrative or other reasons.

Candidates seeking similar contractual hospital support-staff roles can also explore more BMC Hospital Recruitment and Mumbai Municipal Corporation Jobs. Those with a background in electrical trades may check ITI Government Jobs, while candidates in Mumbai can browse more Maharashtra Government Jobs and Mumbai Jobs for other current openings.

content_sections.text: Eligibility is largely common across most posts, with additional trade-specific requirements for certain skilled posts: For Sr. No. 1 to 24, candidates must generally have passed 10th/SSC, or an equivalent examination in the Marathi subject carrying a 100-mark question paper as per the respective post's educational requirement. Candidates must be able to read, write, and speak Marathi. For several posts (Sweeper, Ward Attendant, Ambulance Attendant, Tailor, etc.), candidates must also pass a trade/skill test conducted by the department.

content_sections.heading: BMC Cooper Hospital Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee is Rs. 1,028 (Rs. 870 + 18% GST of Rs. 158), payable at the Cashier Department (Room No. 65), 1st Floor, D Wing, Dr. Rustom Narsee Cooper Hospital, between 22 July 2026 and 30 July 2026, from 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM (excluding Saturdays, Sundays, and public holidays). The fee is non-refundable under any circumstances. The photocopy of the fee receipt must be attached to the application.

content_sections.heading: BMC Cooper Hospital Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: A merit list will be prepared based on the prescribed educational qualification and the marks obtained in the interview. The selection list will be prepared from candidates in the merit list. The interview date will be displayed on the hospital notice board and communicated to candidates by phone. Candidates must reach the interview venue at least half an hour before the scheduled interview time.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for BMC Cooper Hospital Application
content_sections.text: For Medical, Para-medical, and Administrative category posts, the following self-attested photocopies must be attached to the application: Fully filled Application Form Educational Certificates - 10th and 12th mark sheets and certificates, plus documents required as per the qualification for the applied post (Degree/Diploma/Post-Graduation/Fellowship/MSCIT/Typing Certificate, etc.) Registration Certificate from the relevant council, e.g., Maharashtra Medical Council/Pharmacy Council (as required by the post's qualification) Experience Certificates Aadhaar Card PAN Card Address Proof - Driving Licence, Electricity Bill, Voter ID, or Ration Card Photocopy of Marriage Registration Certificate, for married women candidates All original documents must also be carried for verification at the time of the interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for BMC Cooper Hospital Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Ensure you meet the educational qualification, age, and other eligibility conditions for the post you wish to apply for. Pay the prescribed application fee of Rs. 1,028 at the Cashier Department (Room No. 65), 1st Floor, D Wing, Dr. Rustom Narsee Cooper Hospital, between 22 and 30 July 2026, 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM. Fill the application form completely and attach self-attested photocopies of all required educational and other supporting documents, along with the fee receipt photocopy. Submit the completed application in person at the Establishment Department, 1st Floor, D Wing, Hind Hridaysamrat Balasaheb Thackeray Medical College & Dr. Rustom Narsee Cooper Hospital, between 22 and 30 July 2026, up to 4:00 PM. Ensure a valid, regularly used email ID is mentioned in the application. Applications sent by post or submitted online will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in BMC Cooper Hospital Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 115 vacancies across 24 categories of contractual posts at Hind Hridaysamrat Balasaheb Thackeray Medical College & Dr. Rustom Narsee Cooper Hospital, Juhu.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for BMC Cooper Hospital Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted in person between 22 July 2026 and 30 July 2026, from 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM, excluding Saturdays, Sundays, and public holidays.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for BMC Cooper Hospital Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1,028 (Rs. 870 plus 18% GST), payable at the hospital's Cashier Department, and it is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for BMC Cooper Hospital Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 38 years of age as on 01 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. Is BMC Cooper Hospital Recruitment 2026 a permanent job?
faq.answer: No. All 115 posts are purely temporary and contractual, with the contract period running until 31 March 2027. Appointed candidates cannot claim any right to permanent service with the Municipal Corporation.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an online application mode for BMC Cooper Hospital Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. Applications must be submitted in person only. Applications sent by post or submitted online will not be considered.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BMC Cooper Hospital Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on a merit list prepared from the candidate's educational qualification and interview marks.

faq.question: Q8. Is knowledge of Marathi mandatory for BMC Cooper Hospital Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. Most posts require candidates to be able to read, write, and speak Marathi, along with having passed a Marathi language exam as specified in the notification.
